key_insight_run101: REGIME SHIFT NOW ACTION-ABLE: Two inverted veto rules (blocking 100% and 57% WR setups) have been DEACTIVATED. The bot's rule base now correctly reflects post-May-2026 regime: LONG direction is the edge, SHORT direction is the risk. When bot restarts, the first SOL LONG signal will be eligible to trade for the first time in months.
